title: astragalus aequalis
intro: Astragalus aequalis, also known as the variegated milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus aequalis include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially aiding in the prevention of certain cancers and infections. Astragalus aequalis is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule in herbal medicine, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceuticals.
